name: dtp-solid
description: Monorepo for @arminmajerie/date-time-picker-solid: a SolidJS date and time picker

scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @arminmajerie/date-time-picker-solid && npm run build -w dtp-example
scripts.publish:date-time-picker-solid: npm run build -w @arminmajerie/date-time-picker-solid && npm publish -w @arminmajerie/date-time-picker-solid --access public
